title: School of Aviation, Logistics & Tourism Management
content: Charting the Future of Global Industries Welcome to Galgotias University's pioneering School of Aviation, Logistics, and Tourism Management. In an era of unprecedented connectivity and economic transformation, these three dynamic sectors form the backbone of global commerce and human interaction. Our School is dedicated to nurturing a new generation of transformative leaders, innovators, and professionals who will drive growth, efficiency, and sustainability across these vital industries. Building upon Galgotias University's legacy of value-based education, research, and innovation, our School brings together a comprehensive suite of BBA and MBA programs alongside specialized short and long-term certification courses. We are committed to delivering an industry-aligned, experiential learning environment that equips our students with the critical skills, ethical mindset, and global perspective needed to excel and make a lasting impact. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education.
